sections: Open water swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships – Women's 25 km
first_paragraph: The **Women's 25 km** competition of the [Open water swimming events](/wiki/Open_water_swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Open water swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 23.

The **Women's 25 km** competition of the [Open water swimming events](/wiki/Open_water_swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Open water swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 23.

## Medalists

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Open_water_swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_25_km&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Medalists")]

| Gold | Silver | Bronze |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [Ana Marcela Cunha](/wiki/Ana_Marcela_Cunha "Ana Marcela Cunha") (BRA) | [Angela Maurer](/wiki/Angela_Maurer "Angela Maurer") (GER) | [Alice Franco](/wiki/Alice_Franco "Alice Franco") (ITA) |

## Results

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Open_water_swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_25_km&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Results")]

The final was held on July 23.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

| Rank | Swimmer | Nationality | Time |
